version_description: Includes chords, strumming pattern and horn lines arranged for guitar.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Harry Styles
"Watermelon Sugar"

Standard tuning.


[Verse 1]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Tastes like strawberries[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
On a summer evening[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
  And it sounds just like a song[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I want more berries[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
And that summer feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  It's so wonderful and warm[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Breathe me in, breathe me out[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
I don't know if I could ever go without[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
I'm just thinking out loud[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
I don't know if I could ever go without[/tab]
